title: Morgan's Research Impact: Community-Based Participatory Research (CBPR) — D-RED Seminar Slides
content: PDF slide deck from the 2025-10-08 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Morgan's Research Impact: Enhancing Community Health Through Community-Based Participatory Research (CBPR)'. Multi-presenter session featuring Payam Sheikhattari, PhD; Kimberly Warren, PhD; Valerie Odero-Marah, PhD; and Adriana Foster.
